name: uci-har-human-activity-recognition-smartphones
title: Human Activity Recognition Using Smartphones
description: Recordings of 30 subjects (age 19–48) performing 6 activities of daily living while carrying a waist-mounted Samsung Galaxy S II with embedded 3-axial accelerometer and gyroscope (50 Hz).

resources.name: feature-vectors
resources.title: Feature Vectors (Train + Test)
resources.description: 561 engineered time- and frequency-domain features per sliding window, normalized to [-1, 1]. Train: X_train.txt (7352 windows). Test: X_test.txt (2947 windows). Space-separated, no header.

fields.name: feature_{1..561}
fields.description: 561 statistical features. Full list in features.txt.

resources.name: activity-labels
resources.title: Activity Labels (Train + Test)
resources.description: Ground-truth activity class per window. Row-aligned with feature-vectors. Train: y_train.txt. Test: y_test.txt.

resources.name: subject-ids
resources.title: Subject IDs (Train + Test)
resources.description: Anonymized participant ID per window (1–30). Row-aligned with feature-vectors. Train: subject_train.txt. Test: subject_test.txt.

resources.name: raw-inertial-signals
resources.title: Raw Inertial Signals (Train + Test)
resources.description: 9 signal channels × 128 samples/window, normalized to [-1, 1]. Channels: body_acc_{x,y,z}, body_gyro_{x,y,z}, total_acc_{x,y,z}. Train: Inertial Signals/ under train/. Test: same structure under test/.

fields.name: sample_{1..128}
fields.description: 128 time-domain samples per window at 50 Hz.

resources.name: activity-labels-mapping
resources.title: Activity Label Mapping
resources.description: Integer-to-name lookup for the 6 activity classes. File: activity_labels.txt.
